name: Settings theme change persists across navigation
description: User changes the color theme in Settings, navigates away, returns, and the theme selection persists.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Click the Customization tab in the settings page
Click on a different color palette option (such as Forest or Ocean)
Click the Home link in the sidebar to navigate to the dashboard
Click the Settings link in the sidebar again to return to settings
Verify the previously selected color palette is still shown as active or selected in the Customization tab
